title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
summary: New cities are being added, more miles are being driven, and more people are experiencing Tesla’s unsupervised vehicles. Ashok Elluswamy, the company’s head of AI, said that Tesla’s unsupervised robotaxis have driven 380,000 miles across six cities in two different states.
caption: output/2026-07-23/tesla-s-robotaxi-promises-are-clashing-with-reality.txt
